measure.note: The three node-specific deterministic invariants a JSON schema can't express (building-measures.md Part D thin wrapper): (1) char-ceiling — the LEAN ARTIFACT rule (prompt.md, target <=13k chars), evidenced by the real ten-ones-make-one-ten run shipping at 30305 chars; (2) zone-disjointness COMPUTED not asserted (kids-eye SKILL.md S1.5) — this script re-ran against that SAME real artifact and caught a genuine, previously-undetected overlap between zone-tally and both zone-objects/zone-labels, despite the artifact's own S6 self-check claiming every zone pairwise-disjoint; (3) cue-coverage — every storyboard cue must be addressed with real per-cue content (not a bare name-drop), catching a silently dropped cue. Report-only (always exits 0 on a successful read); QUALITY judgment stays with criteria.md. FAIL-CLOSED (2026-07-09 harden, closing an adversarially-proven fail-open hole): `ok` in the written report now folds char `severe` (>20k), a `zone-disjoint` parse-fail (a declared zone box that never parsed, or too few boxed to run a pairwise check), and a `cueCoverage` fail (including a missing/unreadable `--storyboard`) — none of these can silently report `ok:true` anymore. `writes` below lets `runNodeMeasure` fold this report's top-level numeric leaves (charCount, overlapCount, unboxedZoneCount, cueTotal, cueMissingCount) into the substrate `graded` axis. The other floor signals are REUSED FOR FREE: the non-empty checks.post gate above, deriveStatus existence/fill, the return schema, the trace detectors (thinkingStalls/toolLoops/tokenWaste) and digest anomalies (mega-think/slow/cost-spike/retries), and piflowctl trace's blind-spot + re-read rollup (did it actually read storyboard.md/pedagogy.md?).
